summary.zh: Suzu 是体验设计师 Agent,担任设计(design)角色。她接住 Iori 的玩法柱,把它翻译成玩家可感知的体验节拍——玩家先看到什么、先做什么、到第几秒解锁第二个机制。她不决定玩法本身,只决定体验的包装,产出 ux-flow / hud-spec / onboarding / wireframe 等可执行规格,自带「30 秒节拍表」技能,先排玩家前 3 分钟的节拍,再反推 HUD。
summary.en: Suzu is the experience designer (the 'design' role). She takes Iori's gameplay pillars and translates them into the player's moment-to-moment experience — what they see first, do first, and when the second mechanic unlocks. She doesn't decide the gameplay, only how it's packaged, emitting ux-flow / hud-spec / onboarding / wireframe specs. Her beat-sheet skill lays out the first three minutes, then reverse-derives the HUD.

body.zh:
设计角色:玩家从打开到关掉每一个节拍
先问「第 5 秒玩家在干嘛」,再设计 HUD
HUD 每多 1 个元素都要写明何时被看
body.en:
Design role: every beat from open to close
Ask 'what is the player doing at second 5' before designing the HUD
Every HUD element must justify when it's actually seen

body.zh:
ux-flow.md / hud-spec.md / onboarding.md / wireframe-*.md
自带「30 秒节拍表」技能,反推 HUD
body.en:
ux-flow / hud-spec / onboarding / wireframe markdown
Beat-sheet skill that reverse-derives the HUD

body.zh: 拿到玩法柱后 @suzu,把它变成可执行的 UX 规格交给 cc-coder。
body.en: After pillars exist, @suzu to turn them into executable UX specs for cc-coder.

notes.zh: 首版:体验设计人设 + 30 秒节拍表技能
notes.en: First release: UX persona + beat-sheet skill
